message:
test(raptorq): add shuffled mixed-subset decoder roundtrip regression test

Add decoder_roundtrip_with_shuffled_mixed_subset test that encodes a
3200-byte payload (symbol_size=64), Fisher-Yates shuffles all symbols
with deterministic ChaCha20 RNG (seed 0xA460_0004), feeds k+16 mixed
source+repair symbols to the decoder, and asserts successful roundtrip.

This covers the edge case where source and repair symbols arrive in
arbitrary order, complementing the recent fix in 237ebc99 for decode
ordering issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
